block-definition.comment: This category contains a stadistics.js partial access from Snap! WARNING: JavaScript extensions must be activated A global "stats" variable is created for distribution functions. https://thisancog.github.io/statistics.js/inc/distributions.html

This block creates new variables on the selected scope: global (for all sprites), sprite (for this sprite only) or script (only for that blocks stack) with the names given (in 'names' list). If there is already a variable with that name in that scope, it does nothing: no errors and no overwrites.
block-definition.translations: pt:cria as variáveis _ _ ca:crea les _ variables _ es:crear las _ variables _ de:erstellen _ var _

block.l: paramsTyped = params.contents.map(s => {let n = Number(s); return Number.isNaN(n) ? s : n;}) return JSON.stringify(stat[operation](...paramsTyped),null,2);

block-definition.comment: Reports a sorted version of the list in its first input slot, using the comparison function in the second input slot. For a list of numbers, using < as the comparison function will sort from low to high; using > will sort from high to low.
block-definition.translations: ca:ordena _ segons criteri _ pl:$flash sortuj _ za pomocą _

block.l: paramsTyped = params.contents.map(s => {let n = Number(s); return Number.isNaN(n) ? s : n;}) return JSON.stringify(stat[operation](...paramsTyped),null,2);

scripts.comment: WARNING: JavaScript extensions must be activated LIBRARY DOCUMENTATION: https://thisancog.github.io/statistics.js

block-definition.s: SDL next signal from input queue

custom-block.s: SDL next signal from input queue

block-definition.s: SDL send signal %'signal' to %'agent' delay %'delay' param %'param'

custom-block.s: SDL next signal from input queue
SDL next signal from input queue
plot bar chart %l bars at x: %n y: %n width: %n height: %n

block-definition.s: plot bar chart %'data' bars at x: %'left' y: %'bottom' width: %'width' height: %'height'
block-definition.translations: pt:desenha gráfico de barras de _ em (x: _ , y: _ ) com largura _ e altura _ ca:dibuixa gràfic _ a x: _ y: _ amplada: _ alçada: _

block.comment: find out how wide a digit is at two sizes

custom-block.s: sort table %l on field %n in %s order

block.comment: If smallest value < 0, the x axis isn't at the bottom. Note that sort is by > not by <. Not clear this can happen in a histogram!
Choose label format depending on label width vs. bar width.

block-definition.s: sort table %'data' on field %'field number' in %'order' order
block-definition.translations: ca:ordena taula _ pel camp _ en ordre _

custom-block.s: SDL send signal %s to %s delay %s param %s
SDL send signal %s to %s delay %s param %s
